name: OpenGraph MCP
description: Access OpenGraph.io APIs from Claude - fetch OG/social metadata, scrape or extract content, capture screenshots, convert pages to Markdown, query sites with AI, and generate images.
author: SecureCoders

inputs.name: OpenGraph App ID
inputs.description: Your OpenGraph.io API App ID. Get one at https://www.opengraph.io/

tools.name: getOgData
tools.description: Fetch Open Graph metadata and social preview data from a URL

tools.name: getOgScrapeData
tools.description: Scrape raw HTML from a URL

tools.name: getOgScreenshot
tools.description: Capture a screenshot of a webpage

tools.name: getOgQuery
tools.description: Ask a natural-language question about a page's content using AI

tools.name: getOgExtract
tools.description: Extract specific HTML elements or CSS-selected fields from a webpage

tools.name: getOgMarkdown
tools.description: Convert a URL's HTML to clean, readable Markdown

tools.name: generateImage
tools.description: Generate illustrations, diagrams, icons, social cards, or QR codes with AI

tools.name: iterateImage
tools.description: Refine or create variations of a previously generated image

tools.name: inspectImageSession
tools.description: Review a generated-image session's metadata and asset history

tools.name: exportImageAsset
tools.description: Export a generated image asset as inline base64 (or save to disk locally)
